SEPARATOR = " | "


def parse_log_lines(lines):
    entries = []
    for line in lines:
        ts_end = line.index(SEPARATOR)
        timestamp = line[:ts_end]
        rest = line[ts_end + len(SEPARATOR):]
        lvl_end = rest.index(SEPARATOR)
        level = rest[:lvl_end]
        message = rest[lvl_end + len(SEPARATOR):]
        entries.append({"ts": timestamp, "level": level, "msg": message})
    return entries


def normalize_paths(raw_paths):
    results = []
    for raw in raw_paths:
        segments = raw.split("/")
        normalized = "/".join(s.lower().strip() for s in segments if s)
        results.append(normalized)
    return results
